human_actions_pending.action: Verify webapp and captive portal work properly on device after HTTP max_uri_handlers fix
human_actions_pending.context: User reported captive portal missing and webapp inaccessible after Wi-Fi profile updates

decisions.rationale: We added 4 new API endpoints for Wi-Fi profiles which pushed the total routes to 34, exceeding the default 32 limit and causing HTTP server initialization to fail.

next_action: Wait for user to verify the device operates normally before continuing with new features.
context_notes: We successfully debugged an issue where the Captive Portal didn't show up and the Webapp crashed due to exceeding the max URI handler limit. The firmware has been flashed with the fix.
